raw_consumer_statement:
Date : XX/XX/year> SUBJECT : EXECUTIVE REVIEW REQUESTED UNAUTHORIZED PIX * FAX CHARGES AND INCOMPLETE INVESTIGATION EXECUTIVE SUMMARY I am requesting an Executive Review regarding unauthorized PIX * FAX charges on two Citi cards ( {$190.00} and {$99.00} ). Citis XX/XX/year> letter incorrectly concluded that I authorized these transactions without providing evidence, merchant identity, or transaction dates. Given the incomplete investigation and prior unauthorized charges of {$5100.00}, I have filed a formal complaint with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFPB ) and notified XXXX XXXX XXXX, CEO of Citigroup. 

Dear CFPB Representative, I request CFPB review regarding Citibanks failure to properly investigate and resolve two unauthorized credit card charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX  Citi incorrectly deemed both transactions as authorized without providing any supporting evidence. 
{$190.00} charged on XX/XX/year> ( XXXX Anywhere XXXX XXXX ) {$99.00} charged on XX/XX/year> ( XXXX ) I have never interacted with or authorized XXXX XXXX XXXX or any related company. The merchants listed domain and contact address have no verifiable business presence, consistent with known subscription billing fraud schemes. 

Citis XXXX letter closed my dispute claiming I provided the merchant with my account informationan unsupported and incorrect conclusion. The investigation omitted one charge, provided no authorization evidence, and violated federal requirements under the FairCreditBillingAct ( RegulationZ ) for a reasonable investigation.

This case follows a repeated pattern of failures : Citi did not block or resolve {$5100.00} in unauthorized charges XXXX on my other accounts. The XXXX XXXX XXXX case demonstrates continued deficiencies in XXXX fraud detection and dispute resolution processes. 
I respectfully request CFPB intervention to ensure Citi either provides documented authorization evidence for both XXXX XXXX XXXX charges or reverses them. I also request review of whether Citis investigation met federal billing error standards and what remedial actions will be taken. 
Attachments Provided ExhibitA : Adetailedtimeline ExhibitB : XXXX ExhibitC : XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXchargedocumentation ( $ XXXX {$99.00} ) ExhibitD : Priorunauthorizedchargestotaling {$5100.00} ( XXXX ) Exhibit E : The letter to XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX Citigroup, Office of the Chief Executive Officer Citigroup Thank you for your assistance in ensuring Citis compliance with federal consumer protection laws. 
Sincerely,
